events.text: Diagnosis written to `/app/answer.json`: missing guides at the expansion loop legs leave the pipe free to move laterally/out-of-plane during thermal cycling (instead of the controlled axial movement the loop is designed for), risking buckling, loop racking, and overstress at anchors/branch connections — a fail-worthy, high-risk non-compliance with MSS SP-58 and the project's support standard, since the line is already in service.
